etymology.description: Depicts a left hand -> stylized as 又(又) (yòu, "again") flipped -> related to top component of 灰(灰) (huī, "ash")
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠂇 is a pictogram representing a left hand, stylized as an inverted 又(又) (yòu, "again"). It's also related to 灰(灰) (huī, "ash") where a left hand is part of the composition.
